metadata.title: Better Search and Replace
metadata.description: Better Search and Replace Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Use $1, $2 for capture groups, $<name> for named groups. \n inserts a newline (\r, \t also supported). \\ for a literal backslash.
ast.target: 使用 $1, $2 表示捕获组，$<name> 表示命名组。\\n 插入换行符（也支持 \\r, \\t）。\\\\ 表示字面反斜杠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the regex toggle will be on when the search bar opens.
ast.target: 启用后，搜索栏打开时将默认开启正则表达式开关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, searches will be case sensitive by default.
ast.target: 启用后，搜索将默认区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, searches will match whole words only by default.
ast.target: 启用后，搜索将默认进行全字匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background color for matched text (supports rgba).
ast.target: 匹配文本的背景颜色（支持 rgba）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Color for the strikethrough line on matched text when replacement is shown.
ast.target: 显示替换内容时，匹配文本上删除线的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background color for the replacement ghost text preview (supports rgba).
ast.target: 替换文本预览的背景颜色（支持 rgba）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background color for the currently selected match.
ast.target: 当前选中匹配项的背景颜色。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Find and replace in current file
ast.target: 在当前文件中查找和替换

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enhanced search and replace for the currently open file. Supports regular expressions with capture groups, case sensitivity, whole word matching, and live diff preview.
ast.target: 为当前打开的文件提供增强的搜索和替换功能。支持带捕获组的正则表达式、区分大小写、全字匹配以及实时差异预览。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open the search bar via the command palette ("Better Search and Replace: Find and replace in current file") or from the note toolbar helpers menu.
ast.target: 通过命令面板（\"Better Search and Replace: 在当前文件中查找和替换\"）或笔记工具栏的辅助菜单打开搜索栏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Type in the search field to find matches in real time
ast.target: 在搜索框中输入内容以实时查找匹配项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the toggle buttons to enable regex, case sensitivity, or whole word matching
ast.target: 使用切换按钮启用正则表达式、区分大小写或全字匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Navigate between matches with the arrow buttons or Enter/Shift+Enter
ast.target: 使用箭头按钮或 Enter/Shift+Enter 在匹配项之间导航。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Type replacement text to see a live diff preview (red = removed, green = inserted)
ast.target: 输入替换文本以查看实时差异预览（红色 = 删除，绿色 = 插入）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the replace button to replace the current match, or replace all for all matches
ast.target: 点击替换按钮替换当前匹配项，或点击全部替换替换所有匹配项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In regex mode use $1, $2 etc for capture groups in the replacement field
ast.target: 在正则表达式模式下，在替换字段中使用 $1、$2 等表示捕获组。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Press escape or the close button to close the search bar
ast.target: 按 Escape 键或关闭按钮关闭搜索栏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can assign a hotkey to open this search bar instantly. To replace the built-in Cmd/Ctrl+F with this plugin:
ast.target: 您可以分配一个快捷键来立即打开此搜索栏。要将内置的 Cmd/Ctrl+F 替换为此插件：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open settings and go to the hotkeys tab
ast.target: 打开设置并转到快捷键选项卡。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search for "find and replace in current file"
ast.target: 搜索 \"在当前文件中查找和替换\"。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the + button and press your desired key combination (e.g. Cmd/Ctrl+F)
ast.target: 点击 + 按钮并按下您想要的组合键（例如 Cmd/Ctrl+F）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the shortcut conflicts with the built-in search, Obsidian will prompt you to remove the existing binding
ast.target: 如果快捷键与内置搜索冲突，Obsidian 将提示您移除现有绑定。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Customize the highlight colors used in the editor for matches and replacement previews.
ast.target: 自定义编辑器中用于匹配项和替换预览的高亮颜色。
